data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of preventing scalping, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence that demonstrates how this requirement is being enforced or validated. The absence of any checks or mechanisms related to scalping indicates a clear gap in the implementation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of mechanisms in place to prevent scalping.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement scalping prevention checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that scalping prevention mechanisms are in place and functioning as intended.
